title: arthraxon langsdorffii var. submuticus
intro: Arthraxon langsdorffii var. submuticus, also known as Chinese starweed or Chinese grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of Arthraxon langsdorffii var. submuticus include reducing pain and swelling, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
